name: ArrSuite
description: Installs a selectable group of Arr applications, including Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr, Prowlarr, Byparr, FlareSolverr, Seerr, and Bazarr, into one LXC and manages them through a shared add-and-update command.

notes.text: The selected applications share one LXC, one backup boundary, and one failure domain.
Prowlarr, Byparr, and FlareSolverr are currently available only on amd64; Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr, Seerr, and Bazarr also support arm64.
Use 'arrsuite add' to install another supported application, 'arrsuite remove' or 'arrsuite reset' to manage installed applications, and 'update' to update everything installed.
